reviews.review_description: This game would actually be PEAK if you didn't have to pay a subscription service to play, so sad

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're really bummed to see your 1-star rating, even though you liked the game. You actually can play for free, but it's for a limited time. We'd love nothing more than to make the game completely free forever, but we have our own expenses to cover to let players hunt online with their friends. That's why the subscription is needed, and we've done our best to keep the price as low as we could.

reviews.review_description: the graphics suck and the guns are upside down.

the game is just low key good with graphics and stuff and but the only thing i hate is about how do you have to pay monthly to just do to have voice chat and just do but i don't really like that so i'm gonna still give it a five star

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you so much for your rating — we’re truly happy to hear that you’re enjoying the game. We’d love to make it completely free, but maintaining multiplayer features requires ongoing costs, and this support helps us continue developing and improving the game. Wishing you fun hunts and a great weekend!

reviews.review_description: As title says need a subscription to play

reviews.review_title: Where do we get the guns
reviews.review_description:
I try looking for it
this game is trash

developer_response.body: HI. We're sorry you didn't enjoy the game, perhaps because you weren't able to use the shotgun. It appears automatically when you enter the game if you have the joysticks equipped.

reviews.review_description: I hate the game i cant even play with friends

developer_response.body: Hi, we understand that this is frustrating. So we’ve released an update for the game. The subscription owner can now share the private hunting session code with friends directly in the game (it’s displayed on the hand) and can play together with friends or solo.

reviews.review_description: The game is pretty good itself the only problem is you have to pay monthly to play.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! We are so happy to see your positive feedback :)
